description: CoralTech builds personalisation and search tooling for mid-market e-commerce brands. Their platform provides AI-powered product recommendations, semantic search, and A/B testing. Engineering team of ~40 is almost entirely in-house. No offshore or outsourced engineering; CEO has publicly stated preference for in-house talent.
